opinion.h: JOSEPH WENAR, Appellant, v. WILLIAM A. JONES, Bishop of Porto Rico. No. 143.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Messrs. Frederic R. Coudert, Paul Fuller, and Howard Thayer Kingsbury for appellee.
Appeal dismissed for want of jurisdiction. Harrington v. Holler ( Crawford v. Haller) 111 U.S. 796, 28 L. Ed. 602, 4 Sup. Ct. Rep. 697, and cases cited.
